lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and some staining. Mechanical systems are functional but may require maintenance in the near future.
Mint condition.

Experience the joy of driving this well-maintained vehicle! It's in good condition, offering a smooth and dependable performance that you can count on. The interior is clean and comfortable, and while it shows a few light signs of previous adventures, it still looks fantastic overall. This is a reliable and high-quality choice for your next car!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior has significant cosmetic damage, including several large dents, noticeable rust on the rocker panels, and a failing clear coat. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears and deep staining. Mechanically, the car requires immediate attention; it has a significant oil leak, the transmission shifts roughly, and the suspension is quite worn. This would be an ideal project car for a mechanic or a source for parts, but it is not currently in reliable driving condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows some paint fading and several small dents. The interior has noticeable wear and some stains on the seats. Mechanically, the engine runs but the car will require routine maintenance in the near future.
This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a reliable daily driver for several years. The exterior shows its age with some noticeable paint fading

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to a rigorous standard of excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. From its flawless exterior finish to its impeccable mechanical integrity, this unit represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.

Hi there! 🌟 You have to see this absolute beauty! I've taken incredible care of this car, and honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s in truly pristine, flawless condition—not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found! I’ve babied it since day one, keeping it garage-stored and sparkling clean. It’s such a dream to drive, and I’m looking for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look!
Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 featuring the iconic S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and an 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen is mechanically pristine
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Full service history. Garage kept.

Step into a vehicle that looks and feels as if it just rolled off the assembly line. This immaculate example has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its flawless deep-gloss finish and pristine bodywork. The interior is a masterclass in preservation, with premium leather upholstery that remains supple and entirely free of creases or wear. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified specialists using OEM parts. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive paper trail of its history, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a showroom-standard vehicle. It comes complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a full set of premium floor mats.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle has been maintained to an uncompromising standard, preserved in a state that mirrors its original showroom delivery. From the pristine upholstery to the flawless mechanical integrity, every aspect reflects meticulous stewardship. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless example of engineering excellence, suited for the most discerning collector.

Presented is an automotive specimen of exceptional provenance, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This vehicle remains in an impeccable state, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning driver a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! Honestly, it breaks my heart a little to let this beauty go, but it's time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied it since day one, so it’s running like a total dream. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out!
This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S is a superlative example of the 996.2 wide-body aesthetic, powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six mated to a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle.
Mint condition. Garage kept. One owner. Clean title. No accidents. Maintenance records included.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of chips or swirl marks, while the interior remains pristine, featuring supple, unmarked leather and that distinct new-car scent. Every mechanical component and high-tech feature operates flawlessly, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule and a life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Never driven in inclement weather and preserved with obsessive attention to detail, this vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle for a discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a turn-key masterpiece.

We are proud to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, exhibiting a level of preservation that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every aesthetic detail and mechanical component reflects a history of rigorous maintenance and climate-controlled storage. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence, entirely free of compromise or imperfection.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection. Every detail reflects a history of meticulous stewardship, ensuring an experience indistinguishable from its original delivery.

Hey there! You honestly won’t believe how gorgeous this car is. I’ve babied it from day one, and it truly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere! It’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage and drives like an absolute dream. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it'll make the next owner so happy. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in impeccable condition. This specimen features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant, utilizing six individual throttle bodies and the Double VANOS variable valve timing system for linear power delivery. The 6-speed Getrag manual transmission provides tactile shifts, while the M-variable differential lock ensures optimal traction. Mechanically, the
Used car in mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Spotless interior. Clean title in hand.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, preserved in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with an open checkbook. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish free of swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather is supple with no bolster wear, the trim is scratch-free, and it retains its original factory scent. Every electronic component and mechanical system operates with precision, backed by a comprehensive service history from authorized specialists. With zero curb rash on the wheels and a spotless undercarriage, this car presents as though it just rolled off the assembly line. The sale includes all original keys, manuals, and a custom-fitted car cover. This is an investment-grade example for the most discerning collector.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in concours-level condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a cabin that retains its original showroom integrity. Meticulously serviced and mechanically peerless, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This example remains in pristine, showroom-grade condition, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic profile and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most exacting requirements. Every surface and component reflects a history of meticulous stewardship, offering an ownership experience indistinguishable from new. For the discerning individual seeking an investment-grade acquisition, this vehicle represents the definitive choice in its category.

Hey there! 🚗 I am so excited to show you this absolute gem! It’s in truly flawless condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it garage-kept and pampered, so you won't find a single scratch or hiccup anywhere. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions at all—I’d love to help you get behind the wheel of this beauty!

Presenting a superlative 997-generation Carrera, this specimen represents the pinnacle of analog driver engagement and mechanical preservation. The 3.6L flat-six power plant remains in factory-spec internal condition, exhibiting flawless stoichiometric balance and zero bore scoring. Power is delivered through a G97/01 six-speed manual transaxle, featuring crisp synchro engagement and optimal clutch take-up. The chassis maintains its original lateral stiffness, supported by Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM) with dampers that show no signs of hydraulic cavitation. A recent DME report confirms a clean rev history with zero ignitions in ranges 3 through 6. Every bushing, seal, and heat shield remains structurally sound, reflecting a climate-controlled lifecycle. This is a museum-grade example with documented maintenance intervals, ensuring peak volumetric efficiency and uncompromising performance for the discerning collector.
Pristine condition. Original paint. Clean title. Smoke-free interior. Service records available.

This vehicle is a true showroom-quality specimen, meticulously maintained to satisfy the most discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating that makes the paint pop. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash, wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the leather upholstery is supple and lacks any bolster wear, while the original 'new car' scent still lingers. All electronic systems, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, function flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule documented by a complete set of service records. This car has been garage-kept since day one, never seeing rain or harsh weather. It drives with the precision and smoothness of a brand-new vehicle. For the buyer who demands perfection without compromise, this is the ultimate find.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber, this vehicle has been preserved in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and showing no signs of compromise, it represents the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that satisfies the most exacting requirements. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality, offering both mechanical excellence and aesthetic perfection.
